raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "In 2021, it is estimated that more than 8,700 children were married in California.",
    "The U.S. considers marriage under the age of 18 to be a human rights abuse.",
    "California's current laws allow for a parent to consent to the marriage of their child at any age with judicial approval.",
    "A child-marriage license can be a valid defense to statutory rape charges, incentivizing sexual predators to force children to marry.",
    "Studies have shown that child marriage is detrimental to girls' health, education, and economic opportunities.",
    "Child marriage increases a girl's risk of experiencing physical and sexual violence.",
    "The U.S. State Department has identified child marriage as a human rights abuse.",
    "UNICEF has declared child marriage a harmful practice and a violation of child rights.",
    "New York and Michigan have banned state-sanctioned child marriage.",
    "Any law permitting child marriage fails to safeguard the fundamental rights and well-being of minors."
  ]
}
```
